'''Yisgga''' was a colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yisgga system/Legends|Yisgga system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories which the ''[[Star Morning]]'' had visited.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
